## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Flosum and GrowthX teams to discuss analytics, content strategy, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic is flat overall, but blog content is showing positive growth trends](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic is increasing, indicating content resonance with AI-powered search](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Major website updates and strategic messaging overhaul planned in next 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [New marketing hire starting \~Oct 1 to focus on middle-funnel through retention/advocacy](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Overview

  - [Site-level traffic flat month-over-month, with slight keyword degradation](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Blog traffic showing positive growth, especially in last 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic increasing for both new and existing content](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Some older content seeing traffic drops, potential for refresh/updates](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)

### Content Performance

  - [New blog posts moving from page 2 to page 1 in search results](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Seeing \~40 organic clicks/week to new content, trending positively](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Even low search volume topics getting LLM referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)
  - [Need to improve conversion optimization on blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [Website updates planned, including nav changes and demo request page redesign](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Strategic messaging framework project underway, to be completed in 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
  - [Shifting focus to full customer lifecycle, with dedicated team members for different funnel stages](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
  - [Exploring VWO for A/B testing](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)

### Team Updates

  - [New marketing hire starting \~Oct 1, focusing on middle-funnel through retention/advocacy](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
  - [Sakshi to focus on top-of-funnel activities](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2275.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Confirm if traffic spikes are from email newsletter clicks](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [Identify and prioritize older content for refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Verify indexing status of all published content](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Share strategic messaging framework with GrowthX team when ready](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
  - [Explore setting up Looker Studio dashboard for blog performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [GrowthX to review GA4 data and follow up with specific conversion tracking questions](https://fathom.video/share/hb3g2sf6AWS7xmPSikvA1nuBGK7vEnLC?tab=summary&timestamp=2562.0)
